questions.subject: Environment
questions.prompt: Regarding the International Big Cat Alliance (IBCA), which of the following statements is correct?

options.text: Its Headquarters and Secretariat are hosted in India.
It is a specialized agency of the United Nations Environment Programme headquartered in Kenya.
Its Secretariat is hosted by the International Union for Conservation of Nature (IUCN) in Switzerland.
It was established under the Convention on International Trade in Endangered Species (CITES) with its headquarters in South Africa.

questions.explanation: India and the International Big Cat Alliance (IBCA) signed a Headquarters Agreement to host the IBCA Headquarters and Secretariat in India. The other options present plausible but incorrect institutional affiliations and locations often associated with global environmental governance.
questions.takeaway: India serves as the host country for the International Big Cat Alliance (IBCA) Headquarters and Secretariat.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: India and the International Big Cat Alliance (IBCA) signed a Headquarters Agreement to host the IBCA Headquarters and Secretariat in India, facilitating the efficient discharge of its official functions.

questions.subject: Environment
questions.prompt: The Secretariat and Headquarters of the International Big Cat Alliance (IBCA) are set to be hosted by which of the following countries?
questions.explanation: India and the International Big Cat Alliance (IBCA) signed a Headquarters Agreement to host the IBCA Headquarters and Secretariat in India.
questions.takeaway: India is taking a leadership role in global big cat conservation by hosting the IBCA headquarters.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: India and the International Big Cat Alliance (IBCA) signed a Headquarters Agreement to host the IBCA Headquarters and Secretariat in India, facilitating the efficient discharge of its official functions.
